name: Contera.ai
description: Contera.ai is a SaaS platform that uses a company's internal data, competitor analysis, and market signals to automatically optimize ad campaigns and on-site SEO. name: Cascade
description: Cascade is an AI-driven marketing optimization platform that unifies ad and digital analytics, automation, and creative generation in one intuitive interface. It combines proprietary AI models, human-in-the-loop automation, and exceptional UI/UX to identify bottlenecks, optimize campaigns, and generate high-performing creatives--empowering global marketers to improve conversions and scale faster.
